target.task_template:
Analyze the conversation history and update vocabulary suggestions.

Only analyze records where role is "user". Assistant messages are context only and must not be corrected or scored.

Session directory: {session_dir}/notes/
Read: {session_dir}/thread.jsonl
Write to: {session_dir}/notes/vocab.md

Analyze recent user messages and show optimized versions with diff.

Only analyze records where role is "user". Assistant messages are context only and must not be corrected or scored.

Session directory: {session_dir}/notes/
Read: {session_dir}/thread.jsonl
Write to: {session_dir}/notes/polisher.md

Provide IELTS-specific feedback on the conversation.

Session directory: {session_dir}/notes/
Read: {session_dir}/thread.jsonl
Write to: {session_dir}/notes/ielts_feedback.md

Focus on:
- IELTS speaking criteria (Fluency, Vocabulary, Grammar, Pronunciation)
- Part 2 style extended responses
- Complex sentence structures used correctly
